mano_cua.result_summary: Tailwind CSS样式全部正常工作。通过DevTools验证了17个工具类：bg-gray-50正确生成background-color、p-4生成padding:1rem、mx-auto居中、max-w-screen-lg=1024px、flex/items-center/justify-between布局正确、sm:/lg:响应式前缀正常。样式来源均指向tailwind.css，确认@nuxtjs/tailwindcss模块正确加载。pages和components目录下的Vue组件样式均正确应用。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Comprehensive Tailwind CSS testing completed. All 17 utility classes verified via DevTools: bg-gray-50, p-4, px-4, py-12, mx-auto, max-w-7xl, max-w-screen-lg, block, text-3xl, font-extrabold, sm:px-6, lg:py-16, mt-8/lg:mt-0, space-y-4, flex, items-center, justify-between. All correctly applied from tailwind.css. Layout (Flexbox), colors, spacing, responsive prefixes all working as expected in pages/index.vue and components/CallToAction.vue.
